comment.text: This key displays a button label indicating whether to "Buy" additional storage, "SendRequest" if exceeding the limit, or "Update" an existing storage plan. It appears on a button within the additional storage management panel in Portal Settings. Translators should consider the context of storage subscription status when selecting the most appropriate translation.

usage.context:
const title = !hasStorageSubscription
 ? t("Buy")
 : isExceedingStorageLimit
 ? t("Common:SendRequest")
 : t("Common:Update");
 
 return (
 <div className={styles.buttonWrapper}>
 {hasStorageSubscription &&
 !isDowngradeStoragePlan &&
